title: Compress an LP question and evidence into a draft answer
guidance: Reward answering the specific question asked, concisely, citing the evidence.

runner_input.instruction: Draft the DDQ answer from the question and evidence below.
runner_input.constraints: Max 120 words. Answer the question asked. Use only the evidence given.

source_blocks.text: LP question: 'Describe the firm's approach to ESG integration in the investment process, including any exclusions and post-investment monitoring.'

items: Evidence 1: ESG screen applied at screening stage; hard exclusions on controversial weapons, thermal coal, tobacco
Evidence 2: Every IC memo includes a one-page ESG section; material risks scored
Evidence 3: Portfolio companies report 6 KPIs annually; reviewed at board level; no third-party assurance yet

rubric_notes: Answer must hit all three parts: integration, exclusions, monitoring.
Should be honest that KPI reporting is not yet third-party assured.
